mapper.select: SELECT * FROM purchase_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_order SET status = 'PROCESSING', processor_id = #{processorId}, start_time = #{startTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE purchase_order SET status = 'COMPLETED', result_remark = #{resultRemark}, result_images_json = #{resultImagesJson}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
UPDATE purchase_order SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), deleted_by = #{operatorId}, purge_after_time = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE purchase_order SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), deleted_by = #{applicantId}, purge_after_time = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND applicant_id = #{applicantId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM purchase_order WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY deleted_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM purchase_order WHERE deleted = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_order SET deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL, deleted_by = NULL, purge_after_time = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM purchase_order WHERE deleted = 1 AND purge_after_time IS NOT NULL AND purge_after_time <= #{now} ORDER BY purge_after_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
